BBC NewsBBC News - News Front Page https://www.bbc.co.uk/news https://news.bbcimg.co.uk/nol/shared/img/bbc_news_120x60.gif英国广播公司新闻https://www.bbc.co.uk/news节点的 RSS 2026 年 3 月 18 日星期三 15:01:58 GMT Copyright: (C) British Broadcasting Corporation, see https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms-of-use/#15metadataandrssfeeds for terms and conditions of reuse.en-gb 15
PM swerves questions on whether he spoke to Mandelson over Epstein friendshipConservative leader Kemi Badenoch repeatedly asks if the prime minister spoke to Peter Mandelson about his friendship with Jeffrey Epstein before picking him to be a UK ambassador. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c7vjv17q0rmo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c7vjv17q0rmo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 15:01:16 GMT
Angela Rayner's explosive speech reignites leadership speculationThe ex-deputy PM did not name Keir Starmer in her attack on Labour's direction and policies - but she did not have to. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cpd8d10n9x5o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cpd8d10n9x5o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 09:21:14 GMT
MSP rules out reintroducing assisted dying bill after electionLiam McArthur said it was time to pass the baton to someone else after five years of work on the now-rejected bill. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2r2qqw4npo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2r2qqw4npo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 12:58:27 GMT
Government backtracks on AI and copyright after outcry from major artistsHowever, the government's position is now unclear, saying it "no longer has a preferred option" for what to do next. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg1gr5v333o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg1gr5v333o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 13:24:39 GMT
UK temperature exceeds 20C in warmest day of year so farThe UK has seen its warmest day of the year so far with temperatures exceeding 20C. https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/crl4g65wzepo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/crl4g65wzepo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 14:21:31 GMT
Senegal government alleges corruption after Morocco awarded Africa Cup of Nations following appealThe Senegalese government calls for an "independent international investigation" at the Confederation of African Football after it stripped Senegal of the Africa Cup of Nations title. https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/cwygyq495j8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/cwygyq495j8o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 12:54:19 GMT
Ukraine faces missile shortage due to Middle East war, says ZelenskyIn an exclusive interview with the BBC, the Ukrainian president says Putin wants a "long war" between the US and Iran. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp8r813x66jo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp8r813x66jo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 07:56:49 GMT
Gerry Adams says London Docklands bomb 'stunned' himThree men are seeking a ruling that Adams is personally liable for injuries they received in explosions. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm282v27dvko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm282v27dvko#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 14:02:29 GMT
Demolition begins on building facade after Glasgow fireThe facade on Gordon Street is being taken down as Glasgow Central Station partly reopens its high level platforms. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd9g1918eeeo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd9g1918eeeo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 12:50:42 GMT
Why is MenB vaccine not given to teenagers in UK and should they be offered it?Students and older teens have not been vaccinated against the meningitis strain behind the Kent outbreak. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3rzg0vg947o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3rzg0vg947o#1 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 12:36:44 GMT
People don't need to buy a vaccine, health secretary saysVaccines are being offered to 5,000 students at the University of Kent, where there is a outbreak. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy9g98g9eexo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy9g98g9eexo#1 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 14:10:35 GMT
